items.title: Russian online retail warehouses hit by deadly Ukrainian strikes
items.titleOrig: Russian online retail warehouses hit by deadly Ukrainian strikes
items.desc: Drones targeted Wildberries facilities near Moscow and in Tambov. Ukraine's leader called them "major logistics facilities" supplying "sanctioned components".

items.title: US strikes hit Iran for seventh consecutive night
items.titleOrig: US strikes hit Iran for seventh consecutive night
items.desc: Iran has retaliated against US allies in the region, with Kuwait reporting that a power and water plant had been hit.

items.title: Laos says it can't determine cause of tourist deaths linked to methanol
items.titleOrig: Laos says it can't determine cause of tourist deaths linked to methanol
items.desc: Officials say they have no evidence of poisoning over the 2024 deaths because autopsies were not conducted.

items.title: As Trump Scraps With Meloni, His Envoy to Italy Is at Sea
items.titleOrig: As Trump Scraps With Meloni, His Envoy to Italy Is at Sea
items.desc: Tilman J. Fertitta, the U.S. ambassador to Rome, is summering on his superyacht as President Trump squabbles with Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni of Italy.

items.title: Israel Counters Iranian Spying by Warning Against Recruitment
items.titleOrig: Israel Counters Iranian Spying by Warning Against Recruitment
items.desc: The Israeli authorities have enacted a broad array of countermeasures to contain what they describe as online recruiting efforts by Iranian agents.

items.title: In Bangladesh, Argentina’s Soccer Team Finds a Huge Fan Base
items.titleOrig: In Bangladesh, Argentina’s Soccer Team Finds a Huge Fan Base
items.desc: Bangladesh has never qualified for the World Cup. But every four years, many in the country adopt Argentina’s team as their own.

items.title: They Called Sam Neill ‘Skux.’ (It Was a Compliment.)
items.titleOrig: They Called Sam Neill ‘Skux.’ (It Was a Compliment.)
items.desc: The New Zealand slang word, dating back to the 1990s, was pulled back into circulation in tributes to the actor, who died on Tuesday.

items.title: Here’s the latest.
Why is it so hard for the U.S. to win wars?
items.titleOrig: Why is it so hard for the U.S. to win wars?
items.desc: U.S. presidents have promised short, decisive wars in Afghanistan, Iraq and Iran. All have proved much more difficult than advertised and fallen far short of the political goals set at the beginning.

items.title: 8 killed and more than 60 wounded in Ukrainian drone attack on Russian regions
items.titleOrig: 8 killed and more than 60 wounded in Ukrainian drone attack on Russian regions
items.desc: Kyiv's forces are continuing their aerial campaign against energy infrastructure and military targets inside Russia, aiming to undermine Moscow's war effort.

items.title: The 2000s called. They want their digital camera back
items.titleOrig: The 2000s called. They want their digital camera back
items.desc: Why are people who weren't born 25 years ago snapping up the digital camera of that era? Blame Taylor Swift, trend cycles, childhood nostalgia and smartphone fatigue.

items.title: Why did Jens Spahn's surrogacy spark debate in Germany?
items.titleOrig: Why did Jens Spahn's surrogacy spark debate in Germany?
items.desc: Jens Spahn, a key ally of Chancellor Friedrich Merz, is stepping down amid a controversy surrounding his decision to have a child via a surrogate mother. He had opposed legalizing surrogacy in Germany.

items.title: Germany cracks down on money laundering, tax fraud
items.titleOrig: Germany cracks down on money laundering, tax fraud
items.desc: The German government plans to crack down on tax fraud, money laundering and illegally acquired assets with more audits and stiffer penalties.

items.title: India launches first private rocket into space
items.titleOrig: India launches first private rocket into space
items.desc: Lifting off from an island north of Chennai, the Vikram-1 rocket signals India’s plans to take a larger share of the market for commercial rocket launches.

items.title: Many Ukrainian soldiers outraged over removal of defence minister, troops tell BBC
items.titleOrig: Many Ukrainian soldiers outraged over removal of defence minister, troops tell BBC
items.desc: Protests erupted in Ukraine on Thursday after Mykhailo Fedorov's removal - and now soldiers are also criticising the move.

items.title: 重庆警方公布三起打击整治涉彭水山体崩塌灾害网络谣言典型案例 - 华龙网
items.desc: 重庆警方公布三起打击整治涉彭水山体崩塌灾害网络谣言典型案例 华龙网重庆彭水县山体崩塌救援持续进行 新华网重庆借灾情博眼球 重庆警方查处3起网络谣言 新浪财经网格员，他们是地质灾害防御的重要力量 光明网重庆彭水山体崩塌现场发现生命迹象 观察者

items.title: 新疆四川盆地40℃高温来袭 广西云南贵州等地警惕暴雨致灾 - chinanews.com.cn
items.desc: 新疆四川盆地40℃高温来袭 广西云南贵州等地警惕暴雨致灾 chinanews.com.cn广东将有大雨、暴雨，局地有8级以上大风或冰雹 新浪财经四川盆地高温来袭 广西云南贵州等地将有强降雨 中国青年网暴雨预警：16省区市部分地区有大到暴雨 湖北重庆江苏局地大暴雨 央视网云贵到长江中下游有较强降雨 南方雨带南压 中华网新闻

items.title: 外交部发言人就英钢国有化问题答记者问 - 新华网
items.desc: 外交部发言人就英钢国有化问题答记者问 新华网外交部强调：此事已引起中国民众高度关注|外交部发言人|商务部|英国|中方|钢铁业_手机新浪网 新浪财经英政府将中企旗下钢铁公司国有化，并称：赔偿金额将独立确定，若有，才需支付！专家：英方论调站不住脚 新浪财经商务部新闻发言人就英国政府将英国钢铁国有化答问 中国日报网敬业的钢厂归英国，那账单谁付？ 观察者

items.title: 伊朗驻巴基斯坦大使谴责美方曲解伊美谅解备忘录 - 东方财富
items.desc: 伊朗驻巴基斯坦大使谴责美方曲解伊美谅解备忘录 东方财富伊朗副外长：在美国违反承诺后，伊朗已停止履行伊美谅解备忘录 新浪财经伊朗外交部称伊方目前没有谈判计划 专注于防御 新京报伊朗议长：霍尔木兹海峡是伊朗的国家安全支柱 央视网180名伊朗议员要求复仇 观察者

items.title: 王毅会见印尼经济统筹部长艾尔朗加 - 搜狐网
items.desc: 王毅会见印尼经济统筹部长艾尔朗加 搜狐网印尼国家经济委员会主席：中印尼投资合作前景广阔 thepaper.cn中国提议与印度尼西亚合作的六个优先领域 VOI.id王毅：AI发展应服务全人类 每个国家都有权赶上科技发展潮流 香港電台中方强调与印尼关系稳固 和平日报
